name: PSPDFKit
description: PSPDFKit — PDF SDK for annotation, digital signatures, form processing, and redaction on web, iOS, and Android.

seo.title: PSPDFKit — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PSPDFKit: PSPDFKit — PDF SDK for annotation, digital signatures, form processing, and redaction on web, iOS, and Android.

when_to_use: PDF annotation SDK for web, iOS, and Android applications
E-signature workflows with cryptographic validation in apps
Form processing and PDF data extraction via server-side SDK
Document redaction for legal and compliance workflows
Office document viewer supporting DOCX, PPTX in browsers

pros: Most mature PDF SDK across web/iOS/Android
Trusted by IBM, SAP, Lufthansa, DocuSign
cons: Large bundle size in web apps
Steep learning curve for advanced features
review.verdict: Premier PDF SDK, now Nutrient — expensive but the only choice when you need full editing parity across platforms.
review.best_for: Enterprises embedding full PDF editing in apps across web and native mobile.
review.not_for: Budget-conscious teams or apps needing simple read-only viewing.
